reason: Check that task 6 status, evidence paths, blockers, and next action are recorded truthfully.
Check fixed-sample UAT covers cwd/context isolation, durable dispatch, permission reject/allow, and workspace root limits.
Check UAT evidence uses real user entry, auth/session, DB/API/runtime, and does not rely on mock success.
Check Bytedance multi-agent and orchestrator regressions are included in the acceptance report.
Check runtime workspace fields, permission events, and fail-closed behavior against the backend contract.
Check report lists commands, environment, data ids, UI screenshots, negative evidence, and skipped/blocked facts accurately.
Check runtime unavailable and output/session/log events obey gateway contracts without fake assistant success.
